description: Bring a window to the foreground. Returns: 'focused {title}'. Works for visible windows and windows minimized to the taskbar. Does NOT work for apps that are closed to the system tray — those need to be clicked on the tray icon to restore. If focus_window returns success but the window doesn't appear, the app is likely in the tray (use screenshot to verify). Example: {"title": "Notepad"}
name: focus_window
